summary: Bổ sung chẩn đoán worker/transcode rõ hơn khi NAS mount lệch và giữ ngữ cảnh stale cho proxy storage summary.
changes: Transcode runtime status gio phan biet ro truong hop worker khong gui heartbeat nhung API van thay DSM mount root, giup UI goi y dung huong recreate coopeditor-worker sau khi sua volume NAS.
Neu job transcode gan nhat chet vi source path not mounted / source file not found, thong diep runtime se kem loi do de khoanh ngay vao worker mount thay vi bao offline mo ho.
Proxy storage summary API nay giu ca co stale, giup sidebar va trang quan ly proxy khong mat ngu canh khi he thong dang hien snapshot cache gan nhat.
